The '''rinacat''' was a solitary hunting mammal native to [[Carosi XII]]. It preyed mainly upon herd animals but would occasionally descend from the mountains to attack [[Carosite]]s. Rinacats were known for their unflinching tenacity, and would sometimes cross a continent in pursuit of prey.
